category_sources: source_facts.description says dopewars is a free rewrite of a game originally based on Drug Wars; official homepage describes the game and gameplay.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official homepage identify the project as dopewars.
docs_sources: Official dopewars site has Documentation and FAQ sections.
repo_sources: Official dopewars download page says development code is on GitHub and gives git clone https://github.com/benmwebb/dopewars.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe a Unix/Win32 game with configurable gameplay and multiplayer support.
